data.body:
## Description

Update 7 skill/prompt files to replace the two-step create+comment pattern with single-command create using `-d`/`--description`:

1. `plugins/dso/skills/brainstorm/SKILL.md` — Phase 3 Step 1: merge create + comment into create -d
2. `plugins/dso/skills/roadmap/SKILL.md` — epic creation: merge create + comment into create -d
3. `plugins/dso/skills/preplanning/SKILL.md` — story creation, new_story action: merge create + comment into create -d
4. `plugins/dso/skills/implementation-plan/SKILL.md` — task creation with AC: merge create + comment into create -d
5. `plugins/dso/skills/sprint/SKILL.md` — AC addition: merge create + comment into create -d
6. `plugins/dso/skills/sprint/prompts/impl-plan-dispatch.md` — permitted commands list update
7. `plugins/dso/skills/design-wireframe/SKILL.md` — fix broken -d usage (already has -d but it was silently swallowed as parent_id)

NOTE: `end-session/error-sweep.sh` uses create+comment intentionally for error-handling guard pattern (REVIEW-DEFENSE comment) — exempt from this change.

SAFEGUARD FILE: All files listed above are protected per CLAUDE.md rule 18.

## File Impact
- MODIFY: plugins/dso/skills/brainstorm/SKILL.md
- MODIFY: plugins/dso/skills/roadmap/SKILL.md
- MODIFY: plugins/dso/skills/preplanning/SKILL.md
- MODIFY: plugins/dso/skills/implementation-plan/SKILL.md
- MODIFY: plugins/dso/skills/sprint/SKILL.md
- MODIFY: plugins/dso/skills/sprint/prompts/impl-plan-dispatch.md
- MODIFY: plugins/dso/skills/design-wireframe/SKILL.md

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] `bash tests/run-all.sh` passes (exit 0)
  Verify: bash $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/tests/run-all.sh
- [ ] `ruff check` passes (exit 0)
  Verify: ruff check $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/plugins/dso/scripts/*.py $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/tests/**/*.py
- [ ] `ruff format --check` passes (exit 0)
  Verify: ruff format --check $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/plugins/dso/scripts/*.py $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/tests/**/*.py
- [ ] No SKILL.md or prompt .md uses create+comment for initial ticket description
  Verify: grep -rn 'ticket create' $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/plugins/dso/skills/ --include='*.md' -A5 | grep -c 'ticket comment.*## \(Description\|Context\|Acceptance\|Done\)'  # expect 0
